title: Spider-Man 2
description: Swing through New York as both Peter Parker and Miles Morales in this epic superhero sequel. Face the deadly Kraven the Hunter and the iconic Venom symbiote across a massive open world with thrilling combat and a deeply emotional story.

title: Elden Ring
description: A dark fantasy epic crafted by FromSoftware and George R.R. Martin. Explore the shattered Lands Between, battle fearsome demigods, and uncover the mystery of the Elden Ring in this award-winning open-world action RPG.

title: Ghost of Tsushima
description: Become Jin Sakai, a samurai warrior turned Ghost, as you defend Tsushima Island from a Mongol invasion in feudal Japan. Featuring breathtaking open-world exploration, fluid swordplay, and a stunning visual style.

title: God of War Ragnarok
description: Kratos and Atreus journey across the Nine Realms preparing for the prophesied Norse apocalypse. A gripping story of father and son, gods and monsters, packed with visceral combat and jaw-dropping set pieces.

title: Horizon Forbidden West
description: Aloy ventures into the dangerous Forbidden West to uncover the source of a mysterious plague. Battle enormous machine creatures, explore lush jungles and underwater ruins in this stunning open-world action RPG.

title: Call of Duty: MW3
description: The legendary Modern Warfare saga concludes as Task Force 141 hunts down the ultranationalist Vladimir Makarov across the globe. Features an explosive campaign, classic multiplayer modes, and cooperative Spec Ops missions.

title: Battlefield 2042
description: Fight in the near-future across vast, large-scale battlegrounds. Battlefield 2042 features dynamic weather events, cutting-edge gadgets, and 128-player battles in a world shaped by global conflict and climate catastrophe.

title: Far Cry 6
description: Ignite a revolution in the tropical paradise of Yara, ruled by the dictator Anton Castillo. As guerrilla fighter Dani Rojas, use makeshift weapons and allies to take down a corrupt regime in an explosive open-world FPS.

title: Doom Eternal
description: Hell's armies have invaded Earth. As the DOOM Slayer, rip and tear through demonic hordes across dimensions with a devastating arsenal. The ultimate test of speed, skill, and power in one of the best FPS games ever made.

title: The Walking Dead
description: A haunting tale of survival set in the zombie apocalypse. Follow Lee Everett as he protects young Clementine through a world gone dark. Your choices define the story in this emotional, award-winning episodic adventure.

title: The Wolf Among Us
description: Play as Bigby Wolf, sheriff of Fabletown — a secret community of fairy-tale characters living in New York City. Investigate a dark murder mystery in this gritty noir adventure where your choices determine justice.

title: Batman: Telltale
description: Become Batman and Bruce Wayne simultaneously. This Telltale adventure puts you at the center of Gotham's darkest conspiracy, forcing you to balance the dual life of a billionaire and a vigilante while making painful choices.

title: Tales from Borderlands
description: A hilariously wild ride set in the Borderlands universe. Follow con artist Fiona and Hyperion employee Rhys as they spin an outrageous tale of treasure, betrayal, and chaos across the planet Pandora.

title: Ratchet & Clank
description: Ratchet and Clank are torn apart and thrown across alternate dimensions. Explore stunning alien worlds, wield an arsenal of wacky weapons, and help new heroes rise in this visually spectacular PS5 platformer adventure.

title: Crash Bandicoot 4
description: Crash is back in a brand-new adventure spanning multiple dimensions and timelines. Master reality-bending Quantum Masks, run through wild levels, and take on Dr. Neo Cortex in this charming and challenging platformer.

title: Spyro Trilogy
description: Three classic dragon adventures fully remastered in stunning HD. Glide and flame your way through magical worlds, collect gems, rescue dragonflies, and defeat evil in this beloved collection perfect for all ages.

title: Sackboy: Big Adventure
description: Sackboy sets off on a grand solo (or co-op) platforming adventure to stop the villainous Vex. Jump, craft, and dance through imaginative worlds bursting with creativity, music, and charm on PS5.

title: It Takes Two
description: A couple on the verge of divorce is magically transformed into dolls and must work together to get back to their daughter. This GOTY award-winning co-op platformer is bursting with inventive gameplay and heartfelt storytelling.

title: Spider-Man 2
description: Swing through New York as both Peter Parker and Miles Morales in this epic superhero sequel. Face the deadly Kraven the Hunter and the iconic Venom symbiote across a massive open world with thrilling combat and a deeply emotional story.

title: HitMan II
description: Return as Agent 47 in this globe-trotting assassination adventure. Stalk your targets through living, breathing sandbox environments — from Miami race circuits to Mumbai slums — with unrivaled freedom in how you eliminate them.
